stacks.name: Python Data Science
stacks.description: Jupyter, Pandas, Scipy, and Machine Learning essentials
stacks.init_script:
#!/bin/bash
# Python Data Science stack initialization
echo 'Setting up Python Data Science environment...'
python3 -m pip install --user --upgrade pip setuptools wheel
mkdir -p ~/.jupyter
cat > ~/.jupyter/jupyter_notebook_config.py << 'EOF'
c.NotebookApp.ip = '0.0.0.0'
c.NotebookApp.open_browser = False
c.NotebookApp.port = 8888
EOF
echo 'Python Data Science stack ready!'

stacks.name: Node.js Web Dev
stacks.description: Modern frontend development with Node, Yarn, and PNPM
init_commands: npm install -g yarn pnpm typescript vitest @angular/cli vue-cli
stacks.init_script:
#!/bin/bash
# Node.js Web Dev stack initialization
echo 'Setting up Node.js Web Development environment...'
mkdir -p ~/.npm-global
npm config set prefix '~/.npm-global'
echo 'export PATH=~/.npm-global/bin:$PATH' >> ~/.bashrc
export PATH=~/.npm-global/bin:$PATH
npm install -g create-react-app create-next-app
echo 'Node.js Web Dev stack ready!'

stacks.name: Rust Backend
stacks.description: Systems programming with Rustup, Cargo, and essential tools
init_commands: rustup component add rust-analyzer clippy rustfmt
stacks.init_script:
#!/bin/bash
# Rust Backend stack initialization
echo 'Setting up Rust Backend environment...'
rustup default stable
rustup update
cargo install --locked trunk
echo 'Rust Backend stack ready!'

stacks.name: Go Services
stacks.description: Scalable service development with Go and hot-reloading
stacks.init_script:
#!/bin/bash
# Go Services stack initialization
echo 'Setting up Go Services environment...'
mkdir -p ~/go/src ~/go/bin ~/go/pkg
echo 'export GOPATH=$HOME/go' >> ~/.bashrc
echo 'export PATH=$PATH:$GOPATH/bin' >> ~/.bashrc
go install github.com/cespare/reflex@latest
echo 'Go Services stack ready!'

stacks.name: Java Microservices
stacks.description: Enterprise Java development with Maven, Spring Boot, and Gradle
stacks.init_script:
#!/bin/bash
# Java Microservices stack initialization
echo 'Setting up Java Microservices environment...'
source "$HOME/.sdkman/bin/sdkman-init.sh" 2>/dev/null || true
sdk install maven 3.9.6
sdk install gradle 8.7
echo 'Java Microservices stack ready!'
